title: HZDHCLH Wall Clock 10 Inch Silent Non Ticking Clock Round Wall Decor，Wall Clocks for Living Room Kitchen Office (Pink Gold)
features: ★Silent: Silent wall clock, equipped with precise and non-ticking quartz movement to ensure accurate time, and a good sleep and working environment.

★Design: Different colors bring different visual experience. The transparent tempered glass lens is adopted, which will not break even if it is dropped, which greatly guarantees safety. The diameter is 25 cm/10 inches, and the Arabic numerals are clear and easy to read. It is an office, The perfect decorative wall clock for the living room, classroom, bedroom and bathroom.

★Style: diversified wall clocks with unique retro and simple modern styles. The combination of practicality and beauty will add a touch of charm to your interior design, meet your decoration needs for different homes, and have a higher choice of gifts.

★Use 1 "AA" carbon battery-(not included) most of the movements on the market are not suitable for alkaline batteries with high current output, because these will affect the life of the movement and sometimes even affect the accuracy of the time. It is recommended to use a cheaper zinc-carbon battery, insert the positive electrode first when inserting the battery.
★Service: If you are not satisfied with this clock for any reason, please contact us via Amazon email, we will help guests solve all quality problems. This shopping is absolutely zero risk.
description: Product Description A decorative wall clock that is the icing on the cake.
